import_choose_data_type_desc: Select the type of data you want to import in bulk. Each type has its own template with specific required fields.
import_investor_desc: Import investor profiles with contact and business information.
import_project_desc: Import project records with location, financial, and sector data.
import_exported_items_desc: Import export trade data including products and trade values.
import_download_template_desc: Download the guided template to ensure your data is formatted correctly. Fill in the template and then upload it in the next step.
import_instruction_1: Download the template in Excel (.xlsx) or CSV format.
import_instruction_2: Blue columns are required fields — they must be filled in for every row.
import_instruction_3: Green columns are optional — leave blank if not applicable.
import_instruction_4: Do not modify the column headers or add extra columns.
import_upload_file_desc: Upload your completed template file. Supported formats: .xlsx, .xls, .csv (max 10MB).
import_drag_or_click: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse
import_unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Please use .xlsx, .xls, or .csv
import_parse_error: Failed to parse the uploaded file. Please check the format.
import_custom_endpoint_tooltip: Override the default API endpoint to send data to a custom URL. Leave empty to use the default.
import_endpoint_hint: Leave empty to use the default endpoint for the selected data type.
import_review_desc: Review your data before submitting. Ensure all required fields are filled correctly.
import_failed: Import failed. Please check your data and try again.
validation_failed: Validation failed. Please fix the errors and try again.
val_date_future: Date cannot be in the future
val_tin_format: Ethiopian TIN must be exactly 10 digits (e.g. 0012345678)
val_phone_format: Invalid Ethiopian phone number. Use +251xxxxxxxxx or 09xxxxxxxx
val_name_pattern: Name may only contain Amharic, Latin letters, spaces, hyphens, and dots
val_file_number_format: File number may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, slashes, and dots
val_hs_code_format: HS Code must contain only digits and dots (e.g. 0901.11.00)
val_found_issues: Found {{count}} validation issues. Please fix them in the file and re-upload.
